ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-07-2016 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar May-04-2016 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Apr-20-2016 Continued To May-04-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Feb-24-2016 Continued To Apr-20-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cynthia Bashaar in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that Mr. Rice is no longer with us and asked how long the administrator will need to obtain new counsel. Ms. Bashaar stated that she has a few referrals and that she has made headway. The status on filing a petition for final distribution or petition for approval of status report was continued to April 20, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Ms. Bashaar to obtain new counsel.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Barrientos. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Re Filing Petition For Final Distribution Or Petition For Approval Of Status Report
Off Calendar Dec-30-2015 Continued To Feb-24-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (32075 Mendocino Pass Road, Covelo, California)
Off Calendar Oct-25-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Rice for Cynthia Bashar.

The sale was confirmed at $27,000.00 for an undivived 50% interest based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Court Reporter: Easteller Bruihl, CSR#3077 Clerk: Rosie Noguera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy A. Whitehead.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (32075 Mendocino Pass Road, Covelo, California)
Off Calendar Oct-11-2011 Continued To Oct-25-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Harry Edgar Rice for Petitioner.

Counsel is still waiting for the Reappraisal for Sale. The Court cannot go forward with the sale with the reappraisal. Counsel will file Proof of Service to purchaser. The matter was continued to October 25, 2011 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Whitehead.
